name: openEuler sig-sbom SIG
description: sig-sbom is a working group dedicated to incubating sbom applications and toolchains, with a vision to integrate sbom tools.

name: openEuler sig-sbom SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-sbom SIG maintains 7 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-sbom SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for sig-sbom is a working group dedicated to incubating sbom applications and toolchains, with a vision to integrate sbom tools.. The SIG has 8 core members and maintains 7 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-sbom SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-sbom SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at sig-sbom@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-sbom SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-sbom SIG maintains 7 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-sbom.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-sbom SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-sbom SIG has 4 Maintainers, including: Yukai Luo, Quansong Du, ZhaoYu Jiang. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
